description_long: This is a large, detailed bungalow with a steeply pitched, multi-gabled brown roof and a spacious wooden deck area at the front. The property features a prominent swimming pool with a blue and white pattern, surrounded by landscaped gardens and stone pathways. The front facade is adorned with wooden beams, large windows, and a covered porch area, giving it a warm, inviting appearance. The side views reveal additional landscaping, a small water feature, and a terraced garden with steps leading up to the main entrance. The rear of the bungalow showcases more windows and a continuation of the lush greenery, with the roofline extending over the back. The overall design is reminiscent of a Craftsman or lodge-style bungalow, blending natural materials and outdoor living spaces.
description: A spacious, multi-gabled bungalow with a brown roof, large wooden deck, swimming pool, and lush landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large wooden deck, swimming pool, and covered porch with prominent gabled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep roof, terraced garden, water feature, and the pool area extending from the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with multiple windows, extended roofline, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the steps, garden terraces, and the relationship between the house and pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
